title: PvPTweaks
description: A vanilla friendly PvP texture pack that adds many things such as lower shields, shorter swords, and more!
body: A PvP resource pack that adds some textures to change the game for the better! Adds  as see-through totems, better wool, lower fire, shorter swords, wool with a dark outline, and lower shields! And I did use vanillatweaks.net as a template for my shield and fire so credit to them.
